projectDescription: A fully portable AI coding agent that runs from a USB drive on any PC — bundling Node.js, the OpenClaude engine, and a web dashboard with support for 7 AI providers including offline Ollama.
keyFeatures: Zero-install portable launcher for Windows, Linux, and macOS
Support for 7 AI providers: NVIDIA NIM, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, and Ollama
Bundled Node.js runtime and GitPortable — nothing installed on the host machine
Local speed proxy that trims system prompts by up to 90% for faster Ollama inference
Web dashboard (ChatGPT-style UI) with agent mode, tool cards, and thinking visualization
Limitless Mode for fully autonomous agent execution without approval prompts
Session resume via RESUME.bat with persistent data stored in a portable data/ folder
Auto-update check once per day with --offline flag to skip
publicApiSurface: START.bat — Windows entry point with interactive menu
start.sh — Linux/macOS entry point with interactive menu
RESUME.bat <session-id> — Resume a previous session on Windows
--offline flag — Skip update check on launch
tools/Change_Provider.bat / change_provider.sh — Switch AI provider or API key
tools/Open_Dashboard.bat / open_dashboard.sh — Launch web dashboard on port 3000
tools/Setup_Local_Models.bat / setup_local_models.sh — Download and configure Ollama models
dashboard/server.mjs — Dashboard HTTP server on port 3000
